acceptance_criteria.text: Email blueprint category creates a real draft result, not a static placeholder.
proof: agent_blueprint_workspace.py routes email output through draft_email_with_llm

acceptance_criteria.text: Email draft includes subject, body, checklist, missing information, provenance, and LLM/fallback metadata.
proof: Unit tests cover LLM generator and fallback paths
Production smoke returned analysis_source=gigachat, llm_analysis_used=true, and a non-empty subject

acceptance_criteria.text: Email agent has no external send/publish side effects and stops at final approval.
proof: Unit test verifies no capability step
Production smoke returned external_dispatch_performed=false and approval_type=final_output

acceptance_criteria.text: Run review journal exposes email-specific human details while keeping technical payload collapsible.
proof: _output_details includes Тема письма, Чеклист, and Внешняя отправка
Production smoke validated journal detail labels

acceptance_criteria.text: Local tests, lint, build, production deploy, and production email smoke pass.
proof: production email smoke passed and cleaned fixture
gaps: Existing Sber/GigaChat SSL workaround warning appears in logs.
Authenticated browser UI click-through was not performed in this phase.

known_gaps: Email sending/provider connection is intentionally not implemented.
No authenticated browser UI click-through for the email agent was performed in this phase; API/runtime smoke passed.
